scripts.dev: concurrently -n "INFRA,API,WEB,AI" -c "magenta,blue,green,yellow" "npm run docker:up" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.dev:api: wait-on tcp:5432 tcp:6379 tcp:9092 && npm --prefix node-api run dev
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis kafka zookeeper clickhouse
